block_00: All you need to know to trade Crude Oil
block_01: When trading Commodities such as Crude Oil, knowledge of its chemical characteristics might come in handy. What are Crude Oil grades? How may API gravity affect the production process? Answers to these questions may provide useful insight into the way Crude Oil markets function.
block_02: It is also important to keep an eye out for various external factors affecting Crude Oil prices. From supply and demand balance to political uncertainty, there are different forces determining the price of this Commodity.
block_03: Whether you are thinking about making your first move in Commodity trading or just curious to know more about the Crude Oil market, this article will offer you an overview of the main points every trader should be aware of.
